title: Email Deliverability
html: Stub. The art of getting cold/transactional email into the inbox instead of spam. Stack: SPF + DKIM + DMARC at the DNS layer, list-unsubscribe headers, HTML body discipline (text-to-image ratio, no obfuscated text, valid tags), avoiding spammy phrases ("opportunity"), domain age, IP reputation. Adjacent to ai search optimization in spirit — gaming a probabilistic filter. First mentioned in 2025 09 24 unspam deliverability test.
